anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: The accepted standard declares this exact refine-instance skill id, and the resolved organ mechanism supplies copied-source, topology-classification, failure-gate, negative-case, and receipt evidence for bounded instance repair.

skill_payload.mapping_basis: The accepted standard declares this exact refine-instance skill id, and the resolved organ mechanism supplies copied-source, topology-classification, failure-gate, negative-case, and receipt evidence for bounded instance repair.

statement: Microcosm Concurrency Mission Control Refine Instance
title: Microcosm Concurrency Mission Control Refine Instance
triggers: A concurrency mission control instance has stale or weak copied-source refs, topology classification, failure gates, negative cases, receipts, or claim-ceiling language.
The correction can stay within public coordination fixtures and body-free receipts without granting live scheduling or release authority.
workflow: Inspect the standard, organ atlas row, runtime source locus, copied source-module bundle, mechanism evidence, receipts, generated health, and authority boundary before mutation.
Change only fields that tighten copied source refs, topology classification, failure gates, validator binding, receipt expectations, negative cases, authority ceiling, or anti-claim wording.
Regenerate projections and preserve live scheduling, host mutation, provider, release, private-equivalence, and whole-system claims as residual pressure.
